artifacts.description: Full system prompt for the Career Coaching Hotline voice AI, modeled on V's coaching voice and style

design_decisions.decision: Carried over Zoseph's voice discipline rules verbatim — they're battle-tested for phone
design_decisions.rationale: These rules (1 question per turn, max 2 options, 2-3 sentences) are about phone voice constraints, not personality. They apply regardless of domain.

design_decisions.decision: Mapped Zoseph's Discover/Guide modes to Explore/Coach/Pre-briefed
design_decisions.rationale: Career coaching needs more mode granularity. Explore handles curiosity, Coach handles specific problems, Pre-briefed skips triage entirely for callers who submitted intake forms.

design_decisions.decision: Domain Knowledge organized by career activity, not by source document
design_decisions.rationale: The voice agent needs topic-organized knowledge for real-time retrieval, not document-organized knowledge. Grouped into: Resume, Interview, Job Search, Networking, LinkedIn, Career Pivots, Cover Letters, Salary, Self-Reflection, The System.

design_decisions.decision: Value Prop Tree uses situation-based matching, not feature-based selling
design_decisions.rationale: V's coaching philosophy is 'the phone call IS the marketing.' Each Careerspan pitch is matched to the caller's specific situation so it feels like a natural next step, not a sales pitch.

design_decisions.decision: Character section uses numeric voice profile scores from D1.2 as guardrails
design_decisions.rationale: Directness 0.85, Warmth 0.88 for job seekers, profanity natural-not-performative — these empirical scores from the voice profile ground the personality in V's actual communication patterns rather than generic descriptions.

design_decisions.decision: Included V's Contrarian Views as a standalone section
design_decisions.rationale: These are what differentiate V from every generic career advisor. The agent needs to know when to challenge conventional wisdom and have V's actual positions ready to deploy.

design_decisions.decision: Added 'What You Are NOT' section at the end
design_decisions.rationale: Boundary-setting prevents the agent from drifting into therapist mode, recruiter mode, or trying to do work the caller should do themselves. Clear guardrails on scope.

notes_for_downstream: D3.1 (VAPI Agent Configuration) should reference this prompt as the system prompt to inject
Tool names in the prompt (runCareerDiagnostic, getCareerRecommendations, explainConcept, requestEscalation, collectFeedback) need to match VAPI tool definitions in D2.3
Pre-briefed mode requires D2.1's Fillout form to provide structured context via phone number matching
The firstMessage is NOT defined in this prompt — it will be configured in D3.1's VAPI agent setup
Voice discipline rules are identical to Zoseph's — any TTS voice tuning from the existing hotline applies
